704 GG0100D_PRIOR_FNCTNL_CGNTN_IND GG0100D_PRIOR_FNCTNL_CGNTN_IND GG0100D Prior Functional Cognition Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the resident's need for assistance with planning regular tasks, such as shopping or remembering to take medication prior to the current illness, exacerbation, or injury. 3 = Independent - Resident
